no_items: Checkout basket is empty. Add whole chickens, dressed meat, or boneless shares above to compile an official invoice.
dashboard_subtitle: Poultry Operations Dashboard • Live Stock Counter
low_stock_alert: Low Stock Alert! ({{count}} items of poultry need restocking)
net_cash_info: Net cash of shop operations on hand & due
customer_debt_info: Outstanding customer debt (Udhaar balance) to collect.
supplier_debt_info: Outstanding balance we owe to broiler farms.
stock_info: Cumulative weight of entire on-shelves chicken.
sales_chart_hint: Bar heights show billing value in currency ({{symbol}}).
no_sales_message: No sales billed in system yet. Navigate to Billing tab to generate your first invoice!
pos_description: Produce retail and credit invoices. Weights and prices deduct stock dynamically.
no_items_in_basket: Checkout basket is empty. Add whole chickens, dressed meat, or boneless shares above to compile an official invoice.
msg_select_product: Please select a poultry product first
msg_product_not_found: Poultry product not found in local catalog references
msg_weight_gt_zero: Meat weight must be greater than zero
msg_stock_warning: Warning: You only have {{stock}} Kg of "{{name}}" in inventory. Adding {{weight}} Kg will push stock levels negative. Proceed anyway?
msg_cust_name_blank: Customer name can not be blank
msg_cart_empty: Shopping cart is empty. Please add meat items first!
msg_credit_requires_cust: Udhaar / Credit payments require attaching a registered Account ledger. Use "Register Customer" to create accounts.
msg_paid_exceeds_net: Paid amount cannot exceed the net invoice amount.
msg_critical_failure: Critical operational failure logging transaction. Refresh recommended.
memo_placeholder: e.g. Biryani catering order dispatch with Aslam helper.
software_by: Software by Duck ERP systems Solutions.
displaying_live_inventory: Displaying live weighted inventory in Kilograms (KGs).
register_new_chicken: Register New Chicken Portion or SKU
calculator_desc: In poultry operations, birds experience a loss of weight during cleaning, scaling, and skinning (shrinkage). Use this utility to determine high-precision retail pricing parameters based on dress yield weights.
standard_loss_msg: Standard loss average is ~32% representing blood, feathers, and entrails.
msg_stock_positive: Current stock must be a positive number
msg_wholesale_gt_zero: Wholesale buying rate must be greater than zero
msg_retail_gt_zero: Retail selling rate must be greater than zero
msg_initial_stock_valid: Initial stock must be a valid number
procurement_desc: Record supplier farm imports. Weight increments products and updates wholesale benchmark costs.
unpaid_debt_note: Remaining unpaid is added to Supplier debt balance liabilities.
intake_logs_placeholder: e.g. Broiler cargo batch delivery 14. Average bird size 1.8 Kg.
no_procurement_data: No procurement data stored in database. Log a cargo shipment on the left to initialize logs.
please_select_farm: Please select a Broiler Farm / Supplier.
please_select_product: Please select a target poultry catalog item to increment.
weight_greater_than_zero: Weight in Kg must be greater than zero.
rate_greater_than_zero: Purchase rate must be greater than zero.
paid_exceeds_total: Amount paid cannot exceed total purchase invoice amount.
mismatch_identifiers: System lookup mismatch for key identifiers.
operational_failure: An operational failure occurred during checkout.
ledger_desc: Manage your shop Accounts Receivable (customer udhaar) or Accounts Payable (farm debts).
no_registered_ledger: No registered ledger accounts matches search.
no_ledger_history: This ledger account has no debt or payment history records yet.
cust_detail_placeholder: Choose a customer payment credit account card on the left to review historical statements.
no_breeding_vendors: No breeding vendors tracked matching parameters.
no_supp_ledger_history: This breeding vendor ledger statement is empty.
supp_select_placeholder: Select a farm poultry supplier on the left to reveal ledger balances.
val_select_cust_ledger: Please select a customer ledger card
val_pay_positive: Payment amount must be greater than zero
warn_overpay: Warning: Customer currently owes Rs.{{owed}}. Received payment of Rs.{{amt}} will result in a negative credit balance. Proceed anyway?
warn_overpayout: Warning: We currently owe Rs.{{owed}}. Paying Rs.{{amt}} exceeds liability. Proceed?
no_expenditure_logs: No expenditure logs stored. Submit an outflow receipt on the left to activate lists.
outflow_desc: Log helper salaries, shop rents, utilities, feed stock, and poultry mortality wastage.
success_msg_exp: Logged expenditure of {{amt}} in system ledger successfully!
mortality_stock_alert: Alert: Mortality weight ({{weight}} Kg) exceeds your current whole bird stock levels ({{stock}} Kg). Adjust inventory negative anyway?
low_stock_threshold_alert: Warning: Stock for {{name}} is low ({{remaining}} Kg remaining).
app_footer_description: Designed for micro and small scale breeding broiler business units.
db_engine_desc: Poultry system runs on a 100% Client-Side database engine. Transactions write to secure local containers and will remain completely accessible even if the internet access fails.
export_backups_desc: Export accounting lists and credit ledgers as structured JSON configuration packages to lock shop audits.
